judge_reason: Both sides agree on the main visual content: a black-and-white photograph of the Vought V-173 'Flying Flapjack' in flight with landing gear retracted; Description B adds specific textual elements (e.g., 'Acme Telephoto', headline, date stamp) not mentioned in A, but these are not contradicted.
original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a propeller-driven aircraft, the Vought V-173 "Flying Flapjack," in flight. The aircraft has a wide, disc-like fuselage with short, stout wings and two propellers at the wingtips. It is shown at an angle, with landing gear retracted. The caption is partially visible below the image.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A newspaper clipping with a black-and-white photograph of a single small aircraft shown in profile, and a large text article column beside it; the photo caption reads “Can This Be the Secret?” with “Acme Telephoto” visible.*
